info.title: Bugzilla REST API
info.description: REST API for Bugzilla bug tracking system. Provides CRUD operations for bugs, attachments, comments, users, products, classifications, components, fields, flag types, groups, and bug user last visit tracking.

get.description: Returns the current version of Bugzilla.
Gets information about the extensions that are currently installed and enabled in this Bugzilla.
Returns parameter values currently used in this Bugzilla.
Gets the latest time of the audit_log table.
Logging in with a username and password and receiving a token to use in subsequent requests.

parameters.name: restrict_login
parameters.description: If True, token is restricted to current IP

get.description: Log out the user and invalidate the current token.

get.summary: Check if login token is valid
get.description: Checks if a login token is still valid.
Search for bugs matching given search criteria.

post.description: Create a new bug in Bugzilla.

get.description: Get information about a specific bug.
Gets the history of changes for particular bugs in the database.

parameters.name: new_since
parameters.description: Only return changes newer than this date

get.description: Get all attachments for a given bug.

post.summary: Create an attachment on a bug
post.description: Add an attachment to a bug.

get.description: Get a specific attachment by its ID.
Get all comments for a particular bug.

parameters.name: new_since
parameters.description: Only return comments newer than this date

post.summary: Add a comment to a bug
post.description: Add a new comment to a bug.

get.description: Get a specific comment by its ID.
Get tags for a specific comment.

put.description: Add or remove tags on a comment.

get.description: Get information about user accounts.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description: Search string to match against names

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user.
Returns a list of the IDs of products the user can search or enter bugs against.
Returns full product objects for products the user can access.
Returns full product objects for products the user can file bugs against.
Returns full product objects for products the user can search.
Returns product information for the given product ID or name.
Returns classification information.

post.description: Create a new component in a product.

get.description: Get a component by ID.
Get the list of all bug fields including custom fields.
Get information about a specific bug field.

get.summary: Get legal values for a field
get.description: Get the legal values for a specific field.

get.summary: Get flag types for a product
get.description: Get all flag types for a given product.
List all visible groups.
Get details about a specific group.

get.summary: Get last visit time for a bug
get.description: Get the last time the current user visited a specific bug.

post.description: Update the last visit time for a bug.

get.description: List all bugs the current user has visited.

token.description: Login token to use in subsequent requests
